title: plectronia travancorica
intro: Plectronia travancorica is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Western Ghats of India. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Plectronia travancorica include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Plectronia travancorica are often made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
